arts.sum: "Even if Marcus Rashford kicks off massively, Manchester United would never, ever, ever send him to Arsenal, never in a million years. Ex- Manchester United shot-stopper Ben Foster has dismissed any potential of Marcus Rashford joining Arsenal .
